title: Radiology Technician
description: Intuitive Surgical is seeking a Radiology Technician to support our medical device research and development operations in Des Moines. You'll operate diagnostic imaging equipment, assist with device testing and validation, and ensure compliance with radiation safety standards. This role combines clinical expertise with technical innovation, supporting the advancement of minimally invasive surgical solutions.
responsibilities: Operate X-ray, CT, and ultrasound equipment for device testing and clinical evaluation
Prepare imaging protocols and assist with imaging procedure optimization
Maintain and calibrate diagnostic imaging equipment according to manufacturer specifications
Document imaging results and maintain equipment logs for regulatory compliance
Support clinical studies by positioning devices and capturing high-quality diagnostic images
Ensure proper radiation safety protocols and maintain ALARA standards

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Radiologic Technology from an accredited program
skills: Diagnostic imaging equipment operation and troubleshooting
Medical device knowledge and technical documentation
Data management and imaging system software
certifications: ARRT (American Registry of Radiologic Technologists) certification required
State radiology license or ability to obtain

benefits: Health, dental, and vision insurance coverage
Continuing education support and conference attendance
Flexible hybrid schedule with collaborative work environment
